Package org.apache.juneau.commons.bean

package org.apache.juneau.commons.bean
Bean-modeling layer for Juneau.

Contains the bean-modeling annotations, runtime types, and SPI seams that describe how Java types map to bean property sets, independent of any marshalling concerns. The marshalling layer (in juneau-marshall) layers serializer / parser / swap behavior on top of these primitives.

Annotations
  • @BeanType — marks a class as a bean and configures bean-level options (interface class, stop class, property order, etc.).
  • @BeanProp — configures a bean property (name, getter, setter, etc.).
  • @BeanCtor — marks a constructor as the bean constructor and names its arguments.
  • @BeanIgnore — marks a class, method, field, or constructor as not a bean / not a bean property.
  • @BeanConfig — applies bean-modeling settings declaratively at the config-annotation level.
  • @Name — alternative property name on a parameter.
Runtime types
  • BeanMeta — metadata describing a bean class (properties, constructor, type info).
  • BeanPropertyMeta — metadata describing a single bean property.
  • BeanMap — Map view of a bean backed by its BeanMeta.
  • BeanMapEntry — Map.Entry view of a single bean property.
  • BeanPropertyValue — read-side property holder used by consumers that iterate bean properties.
  • BeanPropertyConsumer — callback for iterating bean properties without materializing a BeanMap.
  • BeanProxyInvocationHandler — InvocationHandler that backs interface-only bean proxies.
  • BeanInterceptor — pre/post hooks fired around bean property reads / writes.
SPI seams
  • BeanConfigContext — immutable POJO carrying all bean-modeling configuration knobs plus SPI hooks. MarshallingContext (in juneau-marshall) installs the marshalling-side resolver / initializer / post-processor.
  • BeanInfo — abstract type-classification surface; ClassMeta extends it on the marshalling side.
  • BeanTypeResolver — resolves Type references to BeanInfo instances.
  • BeanSession — per-operation session surface (type conversion, sub-bean construction, CharSequence parsing).
  • BeanFilter — per-class filter surface; MarshalledFilter implements it.
  • BeanRegistryLookup — bean-dictionary lookup surface; BeanRegistry implements it.
  • BeanMetaInitializer — hook that lets marshalling-side code augment BeanMeta construction (filter discovery, type-name resolution, bean-registry assembly).
  • BeanPropertyPostProcessor — hook that lets marshalling-side code augment BeanPropertyMeta construction (swap / surrogate / format annotation processing).
  • Delegate — pluggable delegate-bean marker.
  • PropertyNamer — pluggable Java-name to bean-property-name transformer.
Thread safety

Practical thread-safety semantics for primary runtime types and SPI seams in this package:

  • Not thread-safe (mutable, no internal synchronization): BeanMap, BeanProxyInvocationHandler, BeanConfigContext.Builder.
  • Thread-safe after construction (immutable metadata/value holders): BeanConfigContext, BeanMeta, BeanPropertyMeta, BeanPropertyValue, BeanMapEntry.
  • Thread safety depends on implementation/state: BeanSession, BeanFilter, BeanRegistryLookup, BeanMetaInitializer, BeanPropertyPostProcessor, BeanPropertyConsumer, BeanInfo.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.commons
     
  • Class
    Description
    BasicPropertyNamer
    Default property namer.
    BeanConfig
    Annotation for specifying bean-modeling config properties on REST classes and methods.
    BeanConfigAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @BeanConfig annotation.
    BeanConfigContext
    Immutable runtime configuration for the bean-modeling layer.
    BeanConfigContext.Builder
    Builder for BeanConfigContext.
    BeanCtor
    Maps constructor arguments to property names on beans with read-only properties.
    BeanCtorAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @BeanCtor annotation.
    BeanCtorAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    BeanFilter
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the per-class filter surface the bean-runtime types (BeanMeta-equivalent) need without coupling the bean-modeling layer to the marshalling-side MarshalledFilter.
    BeanIgnore
    Excludes a class, field, method, or constructor from bean introspection.
    BeanIgnoreAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @BeanIgnore annotation.
    BeanIgnoreAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    BeanInfo<T>
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the type-classification surface the bean-runtime types (BeanMeta-equivalents, BeanPropertyMeta-equivalents, etc.) need without coupling the bean-modeling layer to the marshalling-side ClassMeta.
    BeanInterceptor<T>
    Bean interceptor.
    BeanInterceptor.Void
    Non-existent bean interceptor.
    BeanMap<T>
    Java bean wrapper class.
    BeanMapEntry
    Represents a single entry in a bean map.
    BeanMeta<T>
    Encapsulates all access to the properties of a bean class (like a souped-up BeanInfo).
    BeanMeta.BeanMetaValue<T>
    Represents the result of creating a BeanMeta, including the bean metadata and any reason why it's not a bean.
    BeanMetaInitializer
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes marshalling-aware BeanMeta construction hooks.
    BeanProp
    Annotation that can be applied to bean fields, getter/setter methods, and constructor parameters to control bean introspection and property modeling.
    BeanPropAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @BeanProp annotation.
    BeanPropAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    BeanPropertyConsumer
    Represents a consumer of a single bean property value.
    BeanPropertyMeta
    Contains metadata about a bean property.
    BeanPropertyMeta.Builder
    BeanPropertyMeta builder class.
    BeanPropertyPostProcessor
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that applies marshalling-side post-processing to a BeanPropertyMeta.Builder after BeanPropertyMeta.Builder#validate() succeeds.
    BeanPropertyValue
    Represents a simple bean property value and the meta-data associated with it.
    BeanProxyInvocationHandler<T>
    Provides an InvocationHandler for creating dynamic proxy instances of bean interfaces.
    BeanRegistryLookup
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the dictionary-lookup surface the bean-runtime types need without coupling the bean-modeling layer to the marshalling-side BeanRegistry.
    BeanSession
    Minimum runtime surface that the bean-modeling layer needs from a marshalling session.
    BeanType
    Annotation that can be applied to classes to control bean introspection and modeling.
    BeanTypeAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @BeanType annotation.
    BeanTypeAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    BeanTypeResolver
    Bean-modeling SPI seam that exposes the type-resolution operations the bean-property validation pass needs from the marshalling layer.
    Delegate<T>
    An object that represents another object, often wrapping that object.
    Name
    Specifies the parameter name for bean property mapping.
    PropertyNamer
    Defines an API for converting conventional bean property names to some other form.
    PropertyNamer.Void
    Represents a non-existent class.
    PropertyNamerDLC
    Converts property names to dashed-lower-case format.
    PropertyNamerDUCS
    Converts property names to dashed-upper-case-start format.
    PropertyNamerULC
    Converts property names to underscore-lower-case format.
    PropertyValidator
    Validates a bean-property value against a schema.
    PropertyValidatorFactory
    Builds PropertyValidator instances from a JSON-Schema-shaped map of constraints.
    PropertyValidators
    Discovery helper for PropertyValidatorFactory via ServiceLoader.
